description: Style NoteA fragrance with an aquatic theme by virtue of the brand's name, Blazer by nautilus brings out the dark and mysterious in you. Created for the cosmo man with an edge, we recommend this for a high fashion evening or a dinner date by the ocean. Product DetailsBlazer from Nautilus is styled with the plastic top at the bottom of the blue flaskCautionDo not spray near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying on eyesSize30 ml
